# Layercake

> Layercake is a generative AI design studio that helps creators build brand identities, posters, packaging, editorial graphics, and social campaigns one layer at a time.

Layercake is built by Vela Protocol. Users describe a wish, mood, words, layout, and brand layer; Layercake generates the slice (image or copy) for social, print, and marketing.

## Pages

- [Home](/): What Layercake is and how layered generation works.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Monthly and yearly Pro plans, slice packs, and the Creator Pass code redemption.
- [About](/about): Vela Protocol, disclaimer, acceptable use, refund policy, and support contact.

## Optional

- [Ingredients](/ingredients): Reusable chip library for layers.
